90833a6e96b100dd.topic: BMW iX5 M Blue Calipers M Intakes Spy Photos
90833a6e96b100dd.why_text: The iX5 M represents BMW's most aggressive bet yet that performance EV buyers don't have to choose between zero emissions and M Division brutality — blue brake calipers and M-spec intakes on a full-size electric SUV is a statement of intent. This matters because it arrives as Mercedes-AMG and Audi RS performance are both pushing hard into electrified territory, and BMW needs to prove the M badge still means something when there's no combustion note to hide behind. Spy photos this detailed, this early, signal BMW is comfortable letting the hype build.
